question: What was my previous frequent flyer status on United Airlines before I got the current status?
reasoning_summary: User stated Premier Silver status on 2022-09-16 (source 103) and later stated Premier Gold status on 2023-05-30 (source 232). Since the question date is 2023/06/29, the current status is Premier Gold, and the previous status before that is Premier Silver.

slots.name: current_status
slots.query: current frequent flyer status on United Airlines

slots.name: status_change_date
slots.query: date when current frequent flyer status was obtained on United Airlines

slots.name: previous_status
slots.query: previous frequent flyer status on United Airlines before current status

plan.reason: The question asks for the previous status before the current one, requiring resolution of the current status and its acquisition date to infer the prior state.
